mapper.sql: id, openid, unionid, mobile, real_name, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id,u.real_name AS name,u.mobile, COALESCE(ue.enterprises, 0) AS enterprises, COALESCE(m.matchCount, 0) AS matchCount, m.lastMatch AS lastMatch FROM jc_users u LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT enterprise_id) AS enterprises FROM zj_user_enterprise_relation GROUP BY user_id) ue ON u.id = ue.user_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, COUNT(id) AS matchCount, MAX(created_at) AS lastMatch FROM z_match_records GROUP BY user_id) m ON u.id = m.user_id where u.status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
